title: Found error in internal cell when read blif file generated by write_blif command.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
In this case, the reduce_and cell is described.
**test case:**
module top
(
 input [1:0] cin
);

 wire A1;

assign    A1 =  &cin;

endmodule

**script:**
read_verilog bug.v
proc
write_blif blif.blif
design -reset
read_blif blif.blif

## Expected behavior

No errors.

## Actual behavior

ERROR: Found error in internal cell \top.$auto$blifparse.cc:377:parse_blif$81 ($mux) at kernel/rtlil.cc:771:
  cell $mux $auto$blifparse.cc:377:parse_blif$81
    connect \Y $ternary$top.v:22$8_Y
    connect \S \cin
    connect \B $reduce_or$top.v:22$6_Y
    connect \A $reduce_xor$top.v:22$7_Y
  end
